Subject: Gratitude for the Summer Internship Experience

Dear Professor Thorne,

I hope you are having a wonderful week. I am writing to extend my deepest thanks for offering me the incredible opportunity to intern within your department this past summer. Working under your supervision was a profound learning experience, and I am eager to express how much I valued every moment we shared together.

The time spent on your team allowed me to develop significant technical skills and professional confidence that will serve me throughout my career. To highlight the specific areas where I made the most progress, I would like to emphasize these core accomplishments:

- Led the migration of the legacy database architecture to improve load times.
- Assisted in training two junior developers on internal project management workflows.
- Designed a presentation deck used by the executive board to discuss quarterly goals.

Your mentorship and patience helped navigate challenges I initially feared I could not overcome. I truly appreciate your guidance and look forward to staying connected via LinkedIn. Thank you again for making this season of my life so impactful.

Sincerely,

Alex Morgan<|im_end|>

Subject: Gratitude for the Summer Internship Experience

Dear Professor Thorne,

I hope you are having a wonderful week. I am writing to extend my deepest thanks for offering me the incredible opportunity to intern within your department this past summer. Working under your supervision was a profound learning experience, and I am eager to express how much I valued every moment we shared together.

The time spent on your team allowed me to develop significant technical skills and professional confidence that will serve me throughout my career. To highlight the specific areas where I made the most progress, I would like to emphasize these core accomplishments:

- Led the migration of the legacy database architecture to improve load times.
- Assisted in training two junior developers on internal project management workflows.
- Designed a presentation deck used by the executive board to discuss quarterly goals.

Your mentorship and patience helped navigate challenges I initially feared I could not overcome. I truly appreciate your guidance and look forward to staying connected via LinkedIn. Thank you again for making this season of my life so impactful.

Sincerely,

Alex Morgan<|im_end|>
